headline: Valve says it’s ready to launch the Steam Machine this summer
summary: Valve confirms its delayed Steam Machine PC and Steam Frame VR headset will launch this summer. A recent blog post detailed Verified programs for both hardware pieces. Valve expresses excitement for players to try titles on the new hardware soon.

headline: Cyberdecks used to look like little laptops, but now they’re getting more personal
summary: Cyberdecks are evolving beyond traditional laptop designs into personalized, discreet devices. DIYer Annike Tan creates viral, hidden cyberdecks, like one built into an old purse. Her unique, non-computer-like cyberdecks allow for unnoticed portability.

headline: Kevin O’Leary agrees to downsize massive Utah data center
summary: Kevin O'Leary agreed to halve his planned 40,000-acre Utah data center project. The decision follows significant pressure from local residents and activists. He will remove 19,430 acres from the controversial development.

headline: Google is letting social media stars customize their search result page
summary: Google now offers dedicated Search profiles for major creators and publishers in the US. These profiles allow users to highlight videos, articles, and other online presence. Access is limited to those with at least 100,000 subscribers on YouTube, Instagram, or X.

headline: The Apple Watch Series 11 Drops to $238 During the Early Amazon Resale Prime Day Sale
summary: The Apple Watch Series 11 is on sale for $238. This price is part of an early Amazon Resale Prime Day event. "Used: Like New" units are available in limited quantities.

headline: Walmart Has the Least Expensive GeForce RTX 5070 Ti Prebuilt Gaming PC
summary: Walmart is offering the cheapest GeForce RTX 5070 Ti prebuilt gaming PC. The MSI Codez Z2 model is available. Its price is under $1,750.

headline: Xbox CEO Acknowledges Exclusives Are Needed to Build a Platform; Decisions Are Still Being Made
summary: Xbox CEO Asha Sharma acknowledges the importance of exclusives for platform growth. Discussions are ongoing regarding the future of Xbox exclusive titles. The company is actively making decisions on its exclusives strategy.

headline: Black Ops 7's New Classic Mode Seems to Fix a Lot of Issues Players Have With the Game
summary: Call of Duty: Black Ops 7 introduces a new "Black Ops Classic" mode. Players are highly enjoying this new addition. The mode appears to address several existing player concerns.

headline: Burnham says he would seek to enter any Labour leadership contest
summary: Greater Manchester Mayor Burnham stated he would contest any Labour leadership election. His potential candidacy hinges on winning the Makerfield by-election. This is a significant declaration regarding his political ambitions.

headline: Andrew was sub-letting Royal Lodge cottages, watchdog reveals
summary: A public spending watchdog revealed Andrew sub-letting Royal Lodge cottages. The inquiry examines property arrangements of various royals. This disclosure brings new scrutiny to Andrew's finances.

headline: 'World-first' vaccine designed by artificial intelligence
summary: Cambridge scientists have tested a "world-first" vaccine designed by AI. This marks the first time an AI-designed vaccine has reached the testing phase. The breakthrough signals a new era for vaccine development.

headline: Zelensky proposes face-to-face talks in open letter to Putin
summary: Ukrainian President Zelensky proposes direct talks with Putin via an open letter. He states "direct engagement" is the only path to end the war. The proposal comes as the US focuses on Iran.
